title: phyllostegia ambigua
intro: Phyllostegia ambigua, also known as Hawaiian heliotrope, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is a shrub-like plant with purple flowers and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Phyllostegia ambigua is prepared as an infusion or salve, which is used to treat a variety of health concerns.
